name: claude
description: Anthropic's Claude Code terminal coding agent.

installs.notes: Requires Node.js/npm. If npm is missing or too old, install Node.js first.
Requires Node.js/npm. Prefer a user-managed Node install (nvm) to avoid sudo-owned global npm directories.
Requires Node.js LTS. Open a new PowerShell after install if the claude command is not found.

commonFailures: Node.js/npm must be installed before the npm global install can work.
Global npm bin directories are sometimes missing from PATH; open a new terminal or fix npm prefix/PATH.
Claude Code may require an interactive login or API/account setup after installation.
